mission.title: opentofu: RFC: `-exclude` flag for planning and applying
mission.description:
An RFC detailing how an `-exclude` flag would work in OpenTofu, for planning and applying resources

Many thanks @jamesBalazs for your work on the PoC and RFC for this feature!

Resolves https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/issues/426

## Target Release

1.9.0

## Checklist

- [ ] I have run existing tests to ensure my code doesn't break anything.

- [ ] I have only exported functions, variables and str
